scripts.check: npm run build && cd ../.. && node skills/seo-checker/dist/index.js
scripts.check:dist: npm run build && SEO_CHECK_TARGET=../../dist node dist/index.js
scripts.check:canonical: npm run build && cd ../.. && node skills/seo-checker/dist/index.js canonical
scripts.check:alternate: npm run build && cd ../.. && node skills/seo-checker/dist/index.js alternate
scripts.check:meta: npm run build && cd ../.. && node skills/seo-checker/dist/index.js meta-tags
scripts.check:jsonld: npm run build && cd ../.. && node skills/seo-checker/dist/index.js structured-data
scripts.check:sitemap: npm run build && cd ../.. && node skills/seo-checker/dist/index.js sitemap
scripts.check:url: npm run build && cd ../.. && node skills/seo-checker/dist/index.js url-format
scripts.check:lang-dropdown: npm run build && cd ../.. && node skills/seo-checker/dist/index.js lang-dropdowns
scripts.check:jsonld-content: npm run build && cd ../.. && node skills/seo-checker/dist/index.js jsonld-content
